summary: Executed backend pytest and frontend Playwright E2E for CAOS file/link/voice additions on the public preview URL. Verified file listing/upload/link persistence, TTS payload generation, transcription flow, header menu surfaces, artifacts controls/lists, composer attach upload, read-aloud action, and baseline chat/session/artifact continuity.

integration_issues.issue: Changing to a brand-new user email triggers GET /api/caos/profile/{email} 404 in console before profile upsert; UI continues but request appears as failed network noise.

action_items: Optional: reduce new-user profile bootstrap console 404 noise by lazy-loading profile after first upsert or soft-bootstrap behavior.
Optional: add data-testid to hidden file input inside ArtifactsDrawer upload control for stronger automation parity with composer upload input.
critical_code_review_comments: useCaosShell has callback dependency gaps (e.g., selectSession/createSession/sendMessage omit some referenced callbacks), which risks stale closure behavior after user/state transitions.
Chat route still returns raw exception detail for HTTP 500 responses; sanitize internal error text before returning to clients.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md before auth testing; file currently has no credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed user records, sessions, files, links, and chat turns via public APIs/UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: new regression file covers /api/caos/files (list/upload/link/download behavior), /api/caos/voice/tts, /api/caos/voice/transcribe, and baseline chat/session/artifacts continuity. Frontend: verified header menu surfaces, artifacts drawer controls and listing, composer attach upload through backend, and assistant read action over backend voice path without shell crash.
rca of the issue: Reproduced failing POST /api/caos/voice/transcribe (500). Backend log showed emergentintegrations STT rejected str path type for file upload. Root cause: transcribe_upload passed temp file path as plain string. Mitigation applied: pass Path(temp_path) to stt.transcribe; retest confirmed endpoint returns 200 with text payload.
